key_decisions: REQ-ID flat structure with product/module fields (no 3-tier PROD/MOD/REQ)
Requirements: .agents/ single source, no .users/ mirror, title_ko field
Session-inject: requirements-index NOT injected, on-demand only
Trace: file+symbol references, never line numbers
Retrofitted: status:candidate, code wins over REQ
Lightweight cycle: <3 files, single module = skip REQ-ID
R=2: min supporters >= 2 for CONFIRMED, never auto-confirm single reviewer
Arbiter: must NOT be in reviewer pool, auto-select when config=auto
Lens iteration: ALL active lenses in one prompt per reviewer per round
Escalation: inline user prompt, loop resumes (no break)
Auto-fix: git stash snapshot + diff + rollback on low health
Anti-anchoring: suppress_hash invalidated on code change
Project-agnostic: review-pass is naia-adk-b level skill, not workspace-specific
